topic: When my television is off the black screen reflects a room that is not mine
title: When My TV Is Off, the Black Screen Reflects a Room That Is Not Mine | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: When my television is off, the black screen reflects a room that is not the one I am sitting in.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a black powered off flat screen television reflecting a dim unfamiliar room, dim living room light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Living room. A big flat screen on the wall. I watch it most nights.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a living room with a large flat screen television on the wall, a couch, dim evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Off, it shows my own room back.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a dark TV screen faintly reflecting a normal living room, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One night the dark screen reflected a different room. Older. Wallpaper I have never owned.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a black TV screen reflecting an older room with patterned wallpaper, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I turned around. My room was normal.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a normal living room with a person on a couch, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: In the screen, a hallway behind me that my house does not have.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a dark TV reflecting a hallway behind a couch that should not exist, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand raised in a wave before a dark TV screen, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My reflection waved. But it sat in the other room.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a TV reflection of a person seated in a different room, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each night the reflected room darkens, and a door at the end of its hallway opens wider.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a dark TV reflecting a dim hallway with a door opening at the end, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night a figure stepped from that door and sat beside my reflection on the couch.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a TV screen reflecting a figure sitting beside a reflection on a couch, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I unplugged the TV and turned it to face the wall.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a flat screen television turned to face the wall, an unplugged cord hanging, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning it faced the room again. The screen was on, showing the other room.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a powered on TV screen displaying an empty older room, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
